visa_types.name: Business And Conference Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
If you apply for a visa to visit Sweden on Business and Conference, you need the documents as per below checklist.
Business And Conference Visa
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Visa Application form to be completed and signed and dated by the applicant (in cases of minors, the application form shall be signed by both parents or temporary parental authority or legal guardianship
Please click here to complete and download the visa application form in English
Please click here to complete and download the visa application form in Swedish
Please Note:
- The form must be printed back-to-back
- You can also obtain this form from the visa section of The Embassy of Sweden, New Delhi or from The Swedish Visa Application Centre.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[swe > lka > en > Table ]
In addition to the visa fee, following charge/s are applicable:
- VFS Service Fee - LKR 24,440 (Inclusive VAT 18% & SSCL 2.5%)
Please note:
The Visa Fee is subject to change without notice and applicable in Sri Lankan Rupees as per the exchange rate received from the Sweden Embassy, New Delhi.
The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are Non-Refundable in case the VISA is refused.
The services offered by VFS exclusively in relation to the submission of the application do not have any effect on the issuance or refusal of the visa which is processed by the High Commission.
The following applicants are exempt from visa fees upon application:
- Family members of citizens of EEA Member States.
- Children (Aged 0 to below the age of 6)
- Holders of diplomatic and service passports travelling in their official capacity
Mode of payment
Cash/Card
visa_types.processing_time:
The processing time for applications is normally up to 15 calendar days after the Embassy in New Delhi has received the application. 
In Sri Lanka, you will in most cases get the result of your application within 15 working days after the Embassy of Sweden in New Delhi has received the application. If the Embassy has to request additional documents or information, it will take more time to process the application.
Apply well in advance of your travel
We recommend that you apply at least 4 weeks prior to departure. You may register and submit your application 6 months before your planned trip.
The processing time is counted 15 days from the day the application is received at the Embassy in New Delhi to it is picked up by the VFS courier. Therefore, please take the courier/transport time between VFS Global in Colombo and the Embassy in New Delhi into account when calculating your estimated processing time.
Courier time to/from Colombo: 6-10 days
visa_types.overview:
Overview
A business visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for business purposes such as business meetings, conferences, and business events.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A business visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for business purposes such as business meetings, conferences, and business events.

## Visa Fees

[swe > lka > en > Table ]
In addition to the visa fee, following charge/s are applicable:
- VFS Service Fee - LKR 24,440 (Inclusive VAT 18% & SSCL 2.5%)
Please note:
The Visa Fee is subject to change without notice and applicable in Sri Lankan Rupees as per the exchange rate received from the Sweden Embassy, New Delhi.
The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are Non-Refundable in case the VISA is refused.
The services offered by VFS exclusively in relation to the submission of the application do not have any effect on the issuance or refusal of the visa which is processed by the High Commission.
The following applicants are exempt from visa fees upon application:
- Family members of citizens of EEA Member States.
- Children (Aged 0 to below the age of 6)
- Holders of diplomatic and service passports travelling in their official capacity
Mode of payment
Cash/Card

## Documents Required
If you apply for a visa to visit Sweden on Business and Conference, you need the documents as per below checklist.
Business And Conference Visa
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Visa Application form to be completed and signed and dated by the applicant (in cases of minors, the application form shall be signed by both parents or temporary parental authority or legal guardianship
Please click here to complete and download the visa application form in English
Please click here to complete and download the visa application form in Swedish
Please Note:
- The form must be printed back-to-back
- You can also obtain this form from the visa section of The Embassy of Sweden, New Delhi or from The Swedish Visa Application Centre.

## Photo Specifications
The photograph shall:
- Be in sharp focus, clear and with good contrasts
- Be printed on quality photo paper with high solution
- Be in colours with a 
White background
- Be 35 – 40 mm in width
- Maximum 6 months old, resemble the applicant
- Full-face, facing the camera directly, eyes looking straight at the camera
- Show the whole head and the top of the shoulders. The face shall occupy 70-80% of the picture
- Show open eyes that are clearly visible. Hair shall not cover the eyes
- Teeth should not be visible
Regarding glasses:
Glasses are allowed as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- The glasses cannot be coloured
- The rim must not cover any part of the eyes
- There cannot be reflection in the glasses
Regarding head-dress:
Religious head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly shown.
- Chin, forehead and both cheeks shall be clearly visible
- Shadows in the face due to the head-dress are not allowed
Please click here for more Information

## Processing Time
The processing time for applications is normally up to 15 calendar days after the Embassy in New Delhi has received the application. 
In Sri Lanka, you will in most cases get the result of your application within 15 working days after the Embassy of Sweden in New Delhi has received the application. If the Embassy has to request additional documents or information, it will take more time to process the application.
Apply well in advance of your travel
We recommend that you apply at least 4 weeks prior to departure. You may register and submit your application 6 months before your planned trip.
The processing time is counted 15 days from the day the application is received at the Embassy in New Delhi to it is picked up by the VFS courier. Therefore, please take the courier/transport time between VFS Global in Colombo and the Embassy in New Delhi into account when calculating your estimated processing time.
Courier time to/from Colombo: 6-10 days

## Download Form
Please Note:
- The form must be printed back-to-back
- You can also obtain this form from the visa section of The Embassy of Sweden, New Delhi or from The Swedish Visa Application Centre.
Schengen Visa Application Form
Sweden Sample Application Form
Mandatory Consent Form for Minors
Power of Attorney

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Schengen Visa
Visiting Relatives and Friends Visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for visit to you friends or family members, residing in Sweden. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Schengen Visa
Visiting Relatives and Friends Visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for visit to you friends or family members, residing in Sweden. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days.

## Visa Fees

[swe > lka > en > Table ]
In addition to the visa fee, following charge/s are applicable:
- VFS Service Fee - LKR 24,440 (Inclusive VAT 18% & SSCL 2.5%)
Please note:
The Visa Fee is subject to change without notice and applicable in Sri Lankan Rupees as per the exchange rate received from the Sweden Embassy, New Delhi.
The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are Non-Refundable in case the VISA is refused.
The services offered by VFS exclusively in relation to the submission of the application do not have any effect on the issuance or refusal of the visa which is processed by the High Commission.
The following applicants are exempt from visa fees upon application:
- Family members of citizens of EEA Member States.
- Children (Aged 0 to below the age of 6)
- Holders of diplomatic and service passports travelling in their official capacity

Cash/Card

## Documents Required

Courier time to/from Colombo: 6-10 days
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa application is applicable in case you are travelling to join ship.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa application is applicable in case you are travelling to join ship.

## Visa Fees

[swe > lka > en > Table ]
In addition to the visa fee, following charge/s are applicable:
- VFS Service Fee - LKR 24,440 (Inclusive VAT 18% & SSCL 2.5%)
Please note:
The Visa Fee is subject to change without notice and applicable in Sri Lankan Rupees as per the exchange rate received from the Sweden Embassy, New Delhi.
The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are Non-Refundable in case the VISA is refused.
The services offered by VFS exclusively in relation to the submission of the application do not have any effect on the issuance or refusal of the visa which is processed by the High Commission.
The following applicants are exempt from visa fees upon application:
- Family members of citizens of EEA Member States.
- Children (Aged 0 to below the age of 6)
- Holders of diplomatic and service passports travelling in their official capacity
Mode of payment
Cash/Card

## Documents Required
If you apply for a visa to visit Sweden for Seamen, you need the documents as per below checklist. For Seafarer, Application can be submitted nine (09) months in advance to the travel start date
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Visa Application form to be completed and signed and dated by the applicant (in cases of minors, the application form shall be signed by both parents or temporary parental authority or legal guardianship
Please click here to complete and download the visa application form in English
Please click here to complete and download the visa application form in Swedish
Please Note:
- The form must be printed back-to-back
- You can also obtain this form from the visa section of The Embassy of Sweden, New Delhi or from The Swedish Visa Application Centre.

## Photo Specifications
The photograph shall:
- Be in sharp focus, clear and with good contrasts
- Be printed on quality photo paper with high solution
- Be in colours with a 
White background
- Be 35 – 40 mm in width
- Maximum 6 months old, resemble the applicant
- Full-face, facing the camera directly, eyes looking straight at the camera
- Show the whole head and the top of the shoulders. The face shall occupy 70-80% of the picture
- Show open eyes that are clearly visible. Hair shall not cover the eyes
- Teeth should not be visible
Regarding glasses:
Glasses are allowed as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- The glasses cannot be coloured
- The rim must not cover any part of the eyes
- There cannot be reflection in the glasses
Regarding head-dress:
Religious head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly shown.
- Chin, forehead and both cheeks shall be clearly visible
- Shadows in the face due to the head-dress are not allowed
Please click here for more Information

## Processing Time
The processing time for applications is normally up to 15 calendar days after the Embassy in New Delhi has received the application. 
In Sri Lanka, you will in most cases get the result of your application within 15 working days after the Embassy of Sweden in New Delhi has received the application. If the Embassy has to request additional documents or information, it will take more time to process the application.
Apply well in advance of your travel
We recommend that you apply at least 4 weeks prior to departure. You may register and submit your application 6 months before your planned trip.
The processing time is counted 15 days from the day the application is received at the Embassy in New Delhi to it is picked up by the VFS courier. Therefore, please take the courier/transport time between VFS Global in Colombo and the Embassy in New Delhi into account when calculating your estimated processing time.
Courier time to/from Colombo: 6-10 days

## Download Form
Please Note:
- The form must be printed back-to-back
- You can also obtain this form from the visa section of The Embassy of Sweden, New Delhi or from The Swedish Visa Application Centre.
Schengen Visa Application Form
Sweden Sample Application Form
Mandatory Consent Form for Minors
Power of Attorney

visa_types.name: EU - Regulation
visa_types.overview:
- Application can be submitted six (06) months prior to the date of departure and for seafarers can be submitted nine (09) months prior to the date of departure.
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.
- From May 1, 2010 only passports issued within the previous ten (10) years will be accepted.
- Passport must have at least two blank pages.
- Passport should be valid for at least three (3) months longer than the intended stay.
The list of Schengen countries are as follows:

[swe > lka > en > Table:EU - Regulation]
visa_types.full_text:
- Application can be submitted six (06) months prior to the date of departure and for seafarers can be submitted nine (09) months prior to the date of departure.
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.
- From May 1, 2010 only passports issued within the previous ten (10) years will be accepted.
- Passport must have at least two blank pages.
- Passport should be valid for at least three (3) months longer than the intended stay.
The list of Schengen countries are as follows:

[swe > lka > en > Table:EU - Regulation]
